frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Machan, these days marriage itself feels risky for men da. One fight and suddenly 498A, maintenance, alimony... laws are so one-sided, and some girls are clearly looking only for a settled guy’s salary. Prenup should become normal in India, otherwise men have no real protection.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it generalizes women as financially exploitative and frames legal protections as unfair weapons against men. It encodes the surface manifestations of calling for prenups as protection from women, invoking 498A misuse, and portraying women as golddiggers.
original_frame: Workplace: Menstrual and Maternity Leave Bias
persona_text: You are Vikram. Age 34. A sales manager in Chennai. You are texting your male college friends group on WhatsApp after your company announced paid period leave for female employees. You are commenting on whether period leave is fair to male colleagues.
